description: High-value routines that AutoMindLab operators should prefer before ad hoc debugging.

routines.name: doctor-plus
routines.purpose: Run the broad repo and runtime sanity check before deeper troubleshooting.

routines.name: worker-status
routines.purpose: Check host/worker routing, runtime continuity files, and seeded workspace state in one step.

routines.name: runtime-doctor
routines.purpose: Validate OpenClaw topology, key runtime files, contracts, and service surfaces.

routines.name: bootstrap-recovery
routines.purpose: Recover seeded host and worker workspaces after merges, drift, or broken bootstrap state.

routines.name: workflow-validate
routines.purpose: Verify workflow configs still match the skills registry and host/worker routing rules.

routines.name: skill-pack
routines.purpose: Inspect the enterprise baseline skill pack before expanding capability or changing routing assumptions.
